svg.title: Transformer Encoder Architecture
svg.desc: Full transformer encoder showing input embedding, positional encoding, multi-head self-attention, add & norm, feed-forward network, and output representations.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are input tokens in a transformer encoder?')
sendPrompt('How does token embedding work in a transformer?')
sendPrompt('How does positional encoding work in a transformer encoder?')
sendPrompt('Explain multi-head self-attention in the transformer encoder')
sendPrompt('What does Add and Norm do in the transformer encoder?')
sendPrompt('How does the feed-forward network work inside the transformer encoder?')
sendPrompt('What does the second Add and Norm layer do in the encoder?')
sendPrompt('What is the output of the transformer encoder?')
